block_02: Is email ke maadhyam se hum aapko soochit karna chaahte hain ki aapka trading account me margin ghaata huaa hai. Is sambandh me, aap tab tak koi nai position nahin khol sakte jab tak ki aapake khaate mein margin position ko aavashyak margin staron par vaapas nahin laaya jaata hai.
block_08: ke anusaar, aapke khate mein khule margin sthiti svatah band ho jayegi, jab margin star
block_12: Margin ki kami ko door karane ke lie aap open position banae rakhne ke liye apne khaate mein dhanarashi jama kar sakte hain. Apne account ko margin anupaalan me punarsthaapit karne ke liye aavashyak dhanaraashi dekhne ke liye, kripya traderoom par jayen.
block_14: Yadi aapke paas koi savaal hai, to hamaare
block_16: ko aapke savaalon ka javaab dene me khushi hogi.
